failures.error_message: iNova repository is not accessible in this cloud execution environment. git clone via HTTPS failed with 403 (GITHUB_PAT_QA_BOT lacks read access to RSA-Data-Solutions/iNova). notes: RECURRING (day 15): env_problem — iNova repo unreachable in cloud session for 15 consecutive days (2026-05-20 through 2026-06-03). ACTION REQUIRED: add repo:read scope for RSA-Data-Solutions/iNova to GITHUB_PAT_QA_BOT, OR provision a read-only deploy key / INOVA_READ_PAT secret in this environment.
